title: SkibidiTiers
description: This is a mod similar to TierTägger and McTiers, but with better icons and better functions
body:
![SkibidiTiers Logo](https://files.catbox.moe/g8kcg1.png)

# SkibidiTiers – The Official Nametag-Tiering Mod!

**SkibidiTiers** is the official in-game integration for the [skibiditiers.de](https://skibiditiers.de) leaderboard. 

This mod is officially supported by **skibiditiers.de**

---

### Features

SkibidiTiers is a mod that displays a player's PvP Tier directly in their nametag and Tab list. 
- **Full Support**: Supports all official SkibidiTiers game modes (Sword, Axe, Crystal, UHC, Pot, etc.).
- **Smart Display**: If a player is unranked in a specified game mode, the mod will automatically display their **highest Tier overall**.
- **Always Sync**: Data is refreshed every 5 minutes from the official Web API to ensure absolute accuracy.

---

### Player Profile (Showcase)

SkibidiTiers has a built-in system to view a player's full profile! Use `/tier [player]` to open a premium, transparent dashboard that shows:
- **Region**: The player's home region (EU, NA, etc.).
- **Overall Rank**: Exact placement on the global leaderboard (#).
- **All Tiers**: A comprehensive list of every rank and kit associated with the player.
- **3D Skin Render**: Live 3D body preview from `mc-heads.net`.

---

### Commands
- `/tier [player]` – View a player's detailed SkibidiTiers profile.
- `/tiers` – Quick access to your own profile.

### Dependencies
> [!IMPORTANT]
> This mod requires the following dependencies to function:
> - **Fabric API**
> - **fabric-language-kotlin**
> 
> Please ensure both are installed in your `mods` folder.
>
---
 
### Minecraft Version Support
- **Supported Versions**: 1.21 up to 1.21.11 (**Universal Support**)
 
---

### Forking & Licensing
You are allowed to fork this mod and repurpose it for your own tierlists, under a few conditions:
1. The mod is licensed under the **MPL-2.0**, which means you need to keep your fork open source with the same license and give proper credit to the original work.
2. The icons and logos bundled with this mod are property of **SkibidiTiers**—you must obtain permission before using them in separate projects.

---

*Designed for the SkibidiTiers Community.*
